query:
UPDATE leaderboard
           SET best_score     = MAX(COALESCE(best_score, 0), ?),
               best_time_secs = CASE
                   WHEN ? IS NULL THEN best_time_secs
                   WHEN best_time_secs IS NULL THEN ?
                   ELSE MIN(best_time_secs, ?)
               END,
               recorded_at = ?
           WHERE user_id = ?
